Friend,

Georgia Democrat Jon Ossoff's opponent, David Perdue, is a _Top 10 Senator_ \-- but not the good kind.

Perdue is one of the _Top 10_ most vulnerable Senators running this cycle. And he's running against Jon in what is pegged as one of the _Top 10_ most flippable races.

Perhaps David Perdue is so in danger of losing his Senate seat because he votes with Donald Trump 95% of the time! That puts him -- _you guessed it_ \-- in the _Top 10_ for current Senators.

This fall, Georgia voters will decide between Jon Ossoff -- someone who will vote his conscience and stand for the people -- and David Perdue, one of Trump's top Senate lackeys.

name: Khizr Khan
subject: Peter, will you stand up for our country?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution. |
---
Peter,

At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution: | [](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS")
---
Fast forward four years, and it is clear that Donald Trump lacks any respect for the words inscribed in our Constitution, nor our Democratic institutions.

He believes he is above the law. **He is not.** He believes that there are no consequences for his blatant assault on our democracy. [With your help, we will prove him wrong.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS")

Peter, you have also seen in recent days the severity of Donald Trump's disrespect towards our active duty service members, veterans, and military families. This is an important moment to fight back against Trump's shameful behavior, and replace him with an honorable and decent man in Joe Biden.

So with just 57 days until Election Day, this is the most urgent ask of you I have made to-date. [Will you join me and stand up for our country by chipping in $25 to elect Joe Biden and save our democracy? His team needs to raise another 560 donations from Pennsylvania before midnight to stay on track.](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS&amount=25&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS")

I was proud to endorse Joe Biden early in this election, because I know Joe, and more importantly, Joe knows us.

We are both fathers of a service member, and Joe understands the pain that comes with losing a child. And he has turned that grief into purpose, to serve others. I share Joe's mission, and I believe there is no greater purpose we can have this year than to elect Joe as our next president and fight for our democracy.

[**Peter, I hope you agree. I hope you'll join me to dig deep today and pitch in $25 to Joe's campaign, because our nation's future is riding on how we choose to act in this moment:**](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020_beattrumpfund?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.08.24_B3_Khan_X__F1_S2_C1__nd_RS")

Khizr Khan

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b240/1cd0ac28/15d21a535/35705caa/1831554477/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE BIDEN »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b240/1cd0ac28/15d21a535/35705ca9/1831554477/VEsEBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b240/1cd0ac28/15d21a535/35705cac/1831554477/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). We sincerely thank you for your help and support.

clean_body: At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution. | Peter, At the 2016 Democratic National Convention in Philadelphia, I offered to lend Donald Trump my copy of our Constitution: | "" Fast forward four years, and it is clear that Donald Trump lacks any respect for the words inscribed in our Constitution, nor our Democratic institutions. He believes he is above the law. He is not. He believes that there are no consequences for his blatant assault on our democracy. "" Peter, you have also seen in recent days the severity of Donald Trump's disrespect towards our active duty service members, veterans, and military families. This is an important moment to fight back against Trump's shameful behavior, and replace him with an honorable and decent man in Joe Biden. So with just 57 days until Election Day, this is the most urgent ask of you I have made to-date. "" If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" I was proud to endorse Joe Biden early in this election, because I know Joe, and more importantly, Joe knows us. We are both fathers of a service member, and Joe understands the pain that comes with losing a child. And he has turned that grief into purpose, to serve others. I share Joe's mission, and I believe there is no greater purpose we can have this year than to elect Joe as our next president and fight for our democracy. "" "" Gratefully, Khizr Khan | | "" "" "" "" Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. "" Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

name: Corky Messner
subject: President Trump weighs in...

body:
Click or tap to learn more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/b2074f7485364a14c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter,

Did you see the President's tweet last night about my race for U.S. Senate?

Take a look for yourself, _I think it's clear who President Trump trusts in this race to defeat D.C. Jeanne Shaheen in November_. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/09e61e971ae810f1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Find Your Polling Location!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/39c25b736a5e5f1dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) Today's Republican Primary for U.S. Senate is critically important to our state's future.

The fact of the matter is: **we can't afford six more years of D.C. Jeanne Shaheen, and I'm the only Republican candidate poised to unseat her in November.**

**In the U.S. Senate, I will be an ALLY to President Trump in his fight to Drain The Swamp**. Like him, I'm a political outsider. The last thing our country needs is a career politician like Shaheen at the helm.

Peter, if you haven't found your polling location yet, please take a few moments this morning to check where yours is and incorporate voting into your day. [_**Just click or tap here to use my campaign's online election center**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/544f881937559fb7c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

My campaign has been fueled by grassroots supporters like YOU, and now I'm counting on you to make your voice heard at the polls today.

\- Corky [Find Your Polling Location!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/6a6defc75b0b3856c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/464aa2c0d79f7208c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/176b673e7a0de07e/5003672888a1c067c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

body:
| | | |
---|---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19048348/248137896/1114646829?refcode=SV.SeptUpdate.9.8.20.&amount=50&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTJhZGI3Mi1jNWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLJlAiDznkdhlwRlI4uDT9RFR_cgW7KR0mpwgNTmH5w=) We’re officially one week into September, and we’ve already made huge strides in getting our 2020 Safe Voting Initiative off the ground. Here’s what you’ve helped us accomplish:
1. We’ve **hired new staff members** to run a field program designed to educate voters on their candidates and their options to vote safely in 2020. They’ve already been on the phones every day recruiting volunteers and talking about our winning message.
2. We **built voter registration teams at colleges** across the state. Then, we sent them pandemic-approved voter registration kits to safely register young voters.
3. We’ve held one **virtual event to engage with young voters** and have another one planned.
4. We **created countless voter education tools** with the help of a legal team. Now, we’re releasing them and sharing them with campaigns.
5. We produced a series of **webinars to help candidates adjust to campaigning during a public health crisis**.
6. We hired **FOUR new interns** that will help expand our capacity to get out the vote.
7. We hired new staff to help us run a **record-breaking vote-by-mail program**.

The 2020 Safe Voting Initiative is our largest GOTV effort to date. It doesn’t stop there. Here’s what is left to get done:
1. We need to follow up with voters who have received our **application to vote by mail**.
2. Our college voter registration teams have set a goal of**registering more than 10,000 first-time voters**. They’re also gearing up to run a texting program to mobilize the voters they register.
3. We’ve got to **run a massive texting program** to educate voters on their options to vote safely.
4. Once voting starts, we’ve got to **maintain a voter protection hotline with legal help** ready to thwart the GOP's attempts at voter suppression.
5. Our field staffers have a goal of **making hundreds of thousands of calls and sending even more texts** before the election.

**[To reach these goals, we need to contact thousands of voters, purchase texting and phone banking software, produce and ship voter registration kits, maintain a big staff and engage legal help for our voter protection program.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19048349/248137897/1114646829?refcode=SV.SeptUpdate.9.8.20.&amount=50&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTJhZGI3Mi1jNWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLJlAiDznkdhlwRlI4uDT9RFR_cgW7KR0mpwgNTmH5w=)** That means we've got to raise $20k by the end of September. Peter, this initiative is 100% grassroots-backed. If we’re going to win, we need your support. [**Will you chip in to the 2020 Safe Voting Initiative to help us reach our goals?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19048350/248137898/1114646829?refcode=SV.SeptUpdate.9.8.20.&amount=50&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTJhZGI3Mi1jNWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eLJlAiDznkdhlwRlI4uDT9RFR_cgW7KR0mpwgNTmH5w=) clean_body: | | | | ---|--- | | = We’re officially one week into September, and we’ve already made huge strides in getting our 2020 Safe Voting Initiative off the ground. Here’s what you’ve helped us accomplish: 1. We’ve hired new staff members to run a field program designed to educate voters on their candidates and their options to vote safely in 2020. They’ve already been on the phones every day recruiting volunteers and talking about our winning message. 2. We built voter registration teams at colleges across the state. Then, we sent them pandemic-approved voter registration kits to safely register young voters. 3. We’ve held one virtual event to engage with young voters and have another one planned. 4. We created countless voter education tools with the help of a legal team. Now, we’re releasing them and sharing them with campaigns. 5. We produced a series of webinars to help candidates adjust to campaigning during a public health crisis. 6. We hired FOUR new interns that will help expand our capacity to get out the vote. 7. We hired new staff to help us run a record-breaking vote-by-mail program. The 2020 Safe Voting Initiative is our largest GOTV effort to date. It doesn’t stop there. Here’s what is left to get done: 1. We need to follow up with voters who have received our application to vote by mail. 2. Our college voter registration teams have set a goal ofregistering more than 10,000 first-time voters. They’re also gearing up to run a texting program to mobilize the voters they register. 3. We’ve got to run a massive texting program to educate voters on their options to vote safely. 4. Once voting starts, we’ve got to maintain a voter protection hotline with legal help ready to thwart the GOP's attempts at voter suppression. 5. Our field staffers have a goal of making hundreds of thousands of calls and sending even more texts before the election. = That means we've got to raise $20k by the end of September. Peter, this initiative is 100% grassroots-backed. If we’re going to win, we need your support. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = = = = | ---|--- | | = | Connect With Us | | Indiana Democratic Party 101 W. name: Corky Messner
subject: TODAY IS THE DAY! Where will YOU vote?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Click or tap to find your polling location!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c705e0990291033a/ecd35494849ba96ec3d6b838967d376c/33153) This is it, Peter. Today is the day we've been working towards and working so hard for.

Today is the Republican Primary for New Hampshire's U.S. Senate seat... and **it's critical that you cast your vote if you haven't already**.

If you still don't know where to vote, my team has you covered. They built an official election center online. _**[Just click or tap here to find your nearest polling location](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c705e0990291033a/b55c78bce3044eaec3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_.

Polls across the state close at different times, some are open until 7:00 P.M. and some are open until 8:00 P.M. _**[You can find out your poll's hours using the same tool](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c705e0990291033a/0ad95e6e2828b6f4c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_. [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c705e0990291033a/baa8b8930f58bcd7c3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, this is the most important election of our lifetime. When President Trump was in the Granite State, he spoke to this. **He also exclaimed, "We need Corky!"**

And he's right! We need a Pro-Trump, Pro-Liberty, Pro-Small Business candidate who will DEFEAT D.C. Jeanne Shaheen in November's general election and give President Trump the support he needs in the U.S. Senate.

New Hampshire can't afford another six years under Shaheen, and the first step to unseating her begins today.

Again, if you need to find your polling place and its hours, [_**just click or tap here**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/c705e0990291033a/16af016574ae2c47c3d6b838967d376c/33153). Then be sure to go out and VOTE MESSNER!

body:
56 Days until Election Day! |
---
Peter, The work we do leading up to Election Day will determine whether we win the battle for the soul of our nation. The only way we will defeat Donald Trump is by coming together as a country to organize and win. And we can't do this without you. [There's a lot of exciting things happening on the campaign, and we're not taking our foot off the gas. Will you commit to joining one of the virtual events in your community?](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.08_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.08_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [](https://www.mobilize.us/2020victory/event/308770/?source=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.08_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FIELD_2020.09.08_B10_weeklyorg_X__F1_S1_C1__ac) | [**WHAT: **North Pocono, Dunmore and Moscow - Daily Phone Bank!

Has the pandemic affected you personally, or do you just want to take a break from emails for a couple weeks? We understand. [**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705d03/1610615743/VEsD/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705d02/1610615743/VEsA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and Kamala Harris's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705dff/1610615743/VEsP/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

| [DONATE TO ELECT JOE AND KAMALA »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705dfe/1610615743/VEsHBQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2019.08.07_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer&amount=25")

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. If you'd like to only receive our most important emails, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705d01/1610615743/VEsHBA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/less-emails"). To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b252/1cd0ac28/15d67b89c/35705dfc/1610615743/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: Protect Freedom PAC
subject: PRESS: Protect Freedom PAC endorses Byron Donalds for Congress in FL-19
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: September 8, 2020
---
| Contact: Michael Biundo michael@rightvoter.com, 202-809-6014
---
| |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC Endorses Byron Donalds for Congress in FL-19
---
|
---
| Athens, GA - Protect Freedom PAC, an independent organization dedicated to supporting pro-liberty and freedom-minded candidates, has endorsed Byron Donalds for Congress in FL-19.
Protect Freedom PAC is planning independent expenditure campaigns totaling $5 million for the 2020 election cycle.
Protect Freedom PAC spokesman Michael Biundo stated:
"Byron Donalds is a proven conservative that will bring new ideas to Congress. In the Florida State House, Donalds was a strong defender of liberty, and we know he will bring that same track record and commitment to conservative values to the Halls of Congress."
Protect Freedom PAC endorsed and supported candidates for statewide and federal office in a half dozen states in 2018 and looks to expand its reach for the 2020 cycle. The organization was founded by a team of veterans of the Donald Trump, Ron Paul, and Rand Paul campaigns for President.
---
| | |
---
| Protect Freedom PAC was founded for the purpose of supporting pro-freedom and liberty-minded candidates using the tactics, technology, and strategy that best fits each race individually. PFP was founded by seasoned political veterans with decades of national campaign experience, which includes working on the campaigns of both Ron and Rand Paul.
---
| |
---
| ###
---
|
---
| | Protect Freedom PAC | 196 Alps Rd, Ste 2-244, Athens, GA 30606

name: Mondaire Jones

body:
Together, we can defeat the NRA and protect our communities from gun violence.
#

I couldn’t be prouder to share the first “F” I’ve ever gotten:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19054751/248246631/-1084116692?refcode2=6019024a-e9f1-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200908-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDE5MDI0YS1lOWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dv831vnSNoHr53fEg8cDhX1V_CtatQi9QTJ_UW7RRyM=)
**I’d like to thank the NRA for giving me a failing grade. I will never give up the fight against its extremist agenda.**
**[If you too would get an “F” rating from the NRA, could you make a contribution to my campaign today? Together, we can defeat the NRA and protect our communities from gun violence.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19054752/248246632/-1084116692?refcode2=6019024a-e9f1-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200908-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDE5MDI0YS1lOWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dv831vnSNoHr53fEg8cDhX1V_CtatQi9QTJ_UW7RRyM=)**
I do not believe that people who would fail a background check should be able to own a gun, nor do I believe that we need military-grade weapons on our streets and in our communities.
**In Congress, I will support universal background checks at the point of purchase as well as an assault weapons ban and mandatory buyback program.**
Our families shouldn’t live in fear of gun violence while at school, in our houses of worship, or in the workplace. That starts with standing up to the gun lobby and getting big money out of our politics.
**[Will you donate to my campaign today to help send me to Congress to fight back against the NRA, keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people, and protect our communities from gun violence?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19054753/248246633/-1084116692?refcode2=6019024a-e9f1-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200908-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDE5MDI0YS1lOWYxLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Dv831vnSNoHr53fEg8cDhX1V_CtatQi9QTJ_UW7RRyM=)**
Thank you for your support,
Mondaire

| | It’s September, and that means the campaign trail is about to heat up. We’re launching ads, reaching out to voters, and spreading our progressive message all throughout TX-10. _**But so will our opponent.**_ Republican Michael McCaul has a big fundraising advantage, and if we’re not careful he could drown out our positive message. clean_body: | = | | It’s September, and that means the campaign trail is about to heat up. We’re launching ads, reaching out to voters, and spreading our progressive message all throughout TX-10. But so will our opponent. Republican Michael McCaul has a big fundraising advantage, and if we’re not careful he could drown out our positive message. We’ve already seen a taste of what McCaul is bringing to the table ― he’ll say or do anything to get reelected, and in the closest election of his career, we have to be ready for the worst. = We need your help to make it through the final two months of this campaign.= | | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = | | = This is going to be a tough fight, but that’s exactly what Mike signed up for ― he brought McCaul within a few points of defeat last election, and now he’s looking to finish the job. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: WEEK OF ACTION! Push back on CDC Guidelines! Week of Sept. 7th Action Items
body:
| |
---
This week is a big week. Schools across the nation opened, and then because of ridiculous CDC quarantining guidelines, are closing again. There is a lot of information for you this week, so just do the best you can! And, for our civics lesson this week, simply talk to your kids or grandkids about September 11, 2001. This year marks the 19th anniversary of that terrible day, and we need to be sure that we live up to the pledge to “never forget.”

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Week of Action Against CDC Quarantining Guidelines**
See below for a detailed PDF for each day of action, which includes [signing and sharing a letter about the CDC’s crazy guidelines](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0xldHRlci10by1XaGl0ZS1Ib3VzZS1EQy1RdWFyYW50aW5pbmctR3VpZGVsaW5lcy5kb2N4P21pZD00MjYzNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=L_NU5d1wJzALY5B5nrcr2w). And, remember, even if you do not have children or young adults in K-12 or college, you can still take these actions. If you want America to open and our country to stabilize, we need schools to open and stay open. In addition to helping ensure the education of our future generation, it also helps our communities begin to have continuity and predictability again both at home, at places of employment, and which in turn brings continuity and predictability more broadly in our local communities and our entire nation.
* **[Download Day 1 Call to Action](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0RheTEtRGV0YWlsZWQtQWN0aW9uLUl0ZW1zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=_a45ODqL4tTmu0bTdRwl7A)**
* **[Download Day 2 Call to Action](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0RheTItRGV0YWlsZWQtQWN0aW9uLUl0ZW1zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=3y53XXp07yfSpTCRN7nodA)**
* **[Download Day 3 Call to Action](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0RheTMtRGV0YWlsZWQtQWN0aW9uLUl0ZW1zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=kB8l7ekgdFD8JZ0IEjEYZA)**
* **[Download Day 4 Call to Action](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0RheTQtRGV0YWlsZWQtQWN0aW9uLUl0ZW1zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=mpSie6OpYJJsJGbbjrLOJw)**
* **[Download Day 5 Call to Action](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMjUyLWU3MDBiZjRjYTIxMzQxMWFiZDQ1NWUwNzUxNGQ5ZDNm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL0RheTUtRGV0YWlsZWQtQWN0aW9uLUl0ZW1zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI2MzYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=gIWyp4MsQekYSRhk9ukr7Q)**

|
---
**Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of September 7th **
Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we will remember and discuss the terrorist attacks of September 11, 2001.**
This Friday is September 11th, the 19th anniversary of that horrible day. While some people would like to whitewash what happened or allow our nation to forget, most of us pledged to “never forget.” So, let’s make sure we never forget! We will leave it up to you, depending on the age of your kids or grandkids, how much detail and exactly what you will tell them or talk about. We just want to make sure America remembers the victims and the heroes of that time.
|
---
In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: A record number of Vote By Mail requests
body:
I don’t know if you saw the news, but over one million Illinoisans have requested a vote-by-mail ballot - that is triple the number from 2016! | | |
# A record number of Vote By Mail requests
---
|
---
| | I don’t know if you saw the news, but over one million Illinoisans have requested a vote-by-mail ballot **-** **that is triple the number from 2016!** Here in IL-16, we have seen 40,995 ballot requests, which is enough people to fill the United Center (the arena where the Blackhawks and the Bulls play and where I saw Panic! At The Disco) **two times**.

However, these 40,995 ballots are at risk. A few weeks ago, my opponent said he would support emergency funding for the Postal Service. But when push came to shove, **he voted against the emergency funding**.

When my opponent voted against the Postal Service, he voted against seniors who receive medication by mail, against a safe election process, and against small businesses that use the Postal Service for shipping.

[Click here to chip in and join me in protecting seniors, small businesses, and these 40,995 ballots.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a1c127b090&e=140a9b81e7)

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

|
---

name: Team Carney
subject: ICYMI: The Delaware WE know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
Friends, In case you missed it, the Heritage Foundation is attacking Delaware. We need your help to fight their false narrative. Team Carney [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/4dnBXzY9lFaPO7su_yLYbQ==?midqs=GuYG7huuGmnf29_bTrQKVA==)
## [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/4dnBXzY9lFaPO7su_yLYbQ==)
---

Sorry to bother you during Labor Day weekend, but we had to share this news and ask for your help pushing back. President Trump's supporters at the Heritage Foundation know he's losing this election to Joe Biden. Now they're attacking our state in an attempt to score cheap political points.

**The authors of this article are grasping at straws, and their argument couldn 't be more out of touch. Here's the Delaware we know:**
* We have an **[entrepreneurial, talented workforce](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/fd4SFRre3gJ1fCCqqJ5lVw==)** fueled by the University of Delaware, Delaware State University and Delaware Technical Community College.
* Delaware has a long tradition of innovation, and we consistently **[rank among the top states in science and technology investment](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/67mlF-SbK92wXCBoEvsFhg==)[. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/67mlF-SbK92wXCBoEvsFhg==)**
* **[Working families in Delaware pay less in state and local taxes](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/gHYaXN5ZX4tydVKEF5AC-w==)** than any state but Alaska. With no sales tax and low property taxes, homeownership is more affordable.
* We continue to make investments where they matter most **\- in public education, in health care and** **[good-paying jobs](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/oasyZRzjmAtHyMR02QFfyw==) for all working families. **
* And during this COVID crisis,**Delawareans have trusted the science, followed basic health precautions, and acted with a sense of community.** [_Learn more about new efforts announced by Governor Carney to support Delaware workers and small businesses affected by this pandemic._](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/g_MO0LhN-3IFMM1zRo7nPg==)

**SHARE THE TRUTH. **

**[Chip in >> Help us make sure we have leaders like Governor John Carney](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/4dnBXzY9lFaPO7su_yLYbQ==?midqs=GuYG7huuGmnf29_bTrQKVA==) who want to help strengthen the state's economy** rather than hinder it.

**Defend Delaware >>** **Share stories and articles that show the __real__ Delaware** \- and not some biased outsiders' perspective of it. Here are a few to consider:
* **INNOVATION: **Delaware jumps into the top 10 in tech rankings

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/bvhMw2C-CNCuDTZyqOL2Qw==?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.delawareonline.com%2Fstory%2Fmoney%2Fbusiness%2F2018%2F12%2F31%2Fdelaware-top-10-tech-rankings%2F2433582002%2F) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/VH2C9iS0PYKH366FimgMVQ==)
* **ENTREPRENEURSHIP:** UD Ranked a top school for budding entrepreneurs

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/bvhMw2C-CNCuDTZyqOL2Qw==?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.udel.edu%2Fudaily%2F2019%2Fnovember%2Fhorn-ranking-entrepreneur-princeton-review%2F%23%3A~%3Atext%3DUniversity%2520of%2520Delaware%27s%2520Horn%2520Entrepreneurship%2Cundergraduate%2520schools%2520for%2520entrepreneurial%2520studies.) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/DugO2gDtqwseIXKqVoU_jw==)
* **SCIENCE & TECHNOLOGY:** Report: Delaware ranks #7 in the U.S. for science and technology

[Share](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/vcTmoILt26GfeHfbB-x-ng==?u=https://business.delaware.gov/2018/12/31/report-delaware-ranks-7-u-s-science-technology/) | [Tweet](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/esEwaPhTGHkilzXZTkMDzA==)

Thanks for your help.

\--Team Carney

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/WmO_z0Dx6h25ufNzTXyi5g==?midqs=GuYG7huuGmnf29_bTrQKVA==) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YBjQYs8pqEfW3FIcFCISSw==/4dnBXzY9lFaPO7su_yLYbQ==?midqs=GuYG7huuGmnf29_bTrQKVA==)

FOLLOW & SHARE ON SOCIAL: **@johncarneyforde**

Hey friend,

Today is the day we’ve been working toward: New Hampshire’s primary election.

I want you to know how much I appreciate your support on this journey. It’s people like you who keep me going and remind me why I decided to run in the first place - to make life better for Granite Staters.

I know I’ve asked you for a lot since my campaign kicked off, but today I’m going to ask you for one more thing. **Your vote.**

If you aren’t sure where to go to cast your vote, you can find your closest polling location here: **[https://secure.winred.com/mowers-for-congress/elections-103020/](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=d1688788c3eb477fa5cc1dac1b925372&_e=UmS2su5_fUod0moKzcrY8jxauGCesTPHztbhktesIi0SQgbaD0gikA2jpXBE1fBbg0rjpM-L2pcBKXZj2gtbUBFGqrwgAcpLiBxeQ-7V8N-dIsfAzG9_lL4ZUmIdhOlczKefvcA4B6I50A14dFPNRJQoCcIZENRjXkxErMrd41HyYcYm-Zr_Qz-qNWaeo10Xc1EisxSvo7bCJ9BCOs4FW1FwUzELaaPTzEMlDL0_o7Y8_Y0u3UAQ872Z0gbskBc5NDJZfCPLby_VTok6Ptt6eI1TyrmMwDsNFBW_NX7yM8v6gv_hwV2aoVTawqD3JEEi6b8FZoghk1e1M6Rfx71uap557C3jhSB-39fHw_ADmQp3g1qNqhfFo4tQW0-Lhf7F_bwFU0FgqDd8q0sroq2Dh9qjgHy7knxlXDNIAu4MQXP8s-velLICKGysYjjbuqIe_QH79K5kfeajX2wTw3cAIS6tddClyVtAQCvZ_ed8A6UDO98WBg3rtQ9Gt2X_CU3P)**

Thanks again for being a part of Team Mowers, friend.

\- Matt

name: =?utf-8?Q?Christianna=2C=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: Your weekly #TeamDani update!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/a1d2c1b295ad/your-weekly-teamdani-update?e=140a9b81e7)

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Hello to our fantastic Team Dani!

UPDATES:
* We had another fantastic Weekend of Action! In just one weekend, you contacted over 4,000 people on the phone!
* MVP of the second Weekend of Action goes to: Dave K. who made 197 of those calls in just 3 days!
* We cannot thank you guys enough for all of your hard work. We’ve still got work to do - let's keep up the momentum to flip this seat in November!
* AND WE’RE DOING IT AGAIN THIS WEEKEND!!!!

SIGN UP HERE: https://forms.gle/Ay21buRFAMLBU4PA8

* In the next two months, we are kicking off a HUGE Letter to the Editor (LTE) writing campaign. LTEs are the perfect way to get involved, especially if phone banking is not your thing, or you don't have enough time to commit to a big stack of postcards - we can do it together! Please sign up below!
+ https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdeZa5kMbfSI9bWXnbo-3wpD_HPjpdzOXlxoIERo1vR_eUO3Q/viewform

Some things to stay tuned for...:
* We have started our Park Tours
* Join us for another stop on our IL-16 park tour! Come out for a safe and socially distanced meet and greet with Dani Brzozowski, the Democratic nominee for Congress in IL-16. Ask Dani any questions you have about her campaign, and get to know more about what she stands for! Masks are required. We will provide water and cookies.

This week we have socially distanced meet and greets at:
* Gambino Park, Wednesday, September 9th, 2020
+ 3:00pm-4:30pm
+ Rockford, IL 61114
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/4045488182134260/?acontext=%7B%22source%22%3A5%2C%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22main_list%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%5C%22%5C%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)
* Baumann Park, September 9th, 2020
+ 5:00pm-6:30pm
+ Cherry Valley, IL 6106
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/349761569369682/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A101589521232053%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)
* Kirby Park, September 10th, 2020
+ 3:00pm-4:30pm
+ Spring Valley, IL 61362
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/751525092314434/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A101589521232053%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)
* Streator City Park, September 12th, 2020
+ 11:00am-12:00pm
+ Streator, IL 61364
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/4460985850609417/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A101589521232053%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)
* North Park, September 12th, 2020
+ 1:30pm-2:30pm
+ Coal City, IL 60416
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/304767364186626/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A101589521232053%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)
* Kiwanis Park, September 12th, 2020
+ 4:30pm-5:30pm
+ Ottawa, IL, 61350
+ Link to Facebook event (https://www.facebook.com/events/232239391423620/?acontext=%7B%22action_history%22%3A[%7B%22surface%22%3A%22page%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22page_admin_bar%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%7B%5C%22page_id%5C%22%3A101589521232053%7D%22%7D%2C%7B%22surface%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22mechanism%22%3A%22events_admin_tool%22%2C%22extra_data%22%3A%22%22%7D]%2C%22has_source%22%3Atrue%7D)

A few standing reminders:
* While you’re still on the phone finishing phone banking, CALL YOUR FRIENDS! Everyone in your social circles has the potential to be an activist and volunteer right alongside you - you never know unless you ask! Grab a friend to sign up for a Weekend of Action shift!
* Want to be featured as a Volunteer Voice columnist? If you have helpful tips on effective outreach, send them my way!

Team Voice!

The guest columnist this week is... Nick Pigeon, our volunteer leader!

“There is so much enthusiasm going around in this district—voters are so excited to cast their ballot for Dani. But I know the most enthusiastic people are those who are making those calls and reaching out to voters. They are the ones who are generating the moment and the movement is getting larger each day. I think I speak for all of us that it’s surprising how many positive conversations we are having every day, and the longer we keep at it and the more people hear about us the better they get.”

Christianna Dyer
Digital Organizer, Team Dani

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mariannette?=
subject: Back the Blue
body:
| | | |
---
| Friends,

ICYMI, last week we [officially launched our law enforcement coalition.](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=6baf3527b9&e=16fac31a0f) We are proud to have a coalition comprised of the men and women who put their lives on the line every day to keep us safe.

We are drawing a clear line in the sand between us and our radical opponent, Rita Hart. She has kept silent about our country's police while her democrat colleagues call to defund them.

I will never waver in my support for our men and women in uniform and I will actively oppose any bill, amendment or resolution aimed at defunding our police. Period.

If you back the blue and want a candidate who will fight for our police, [please donate $100, $50 or $25 today!](https://millermeeks2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7d3bd416b094d33aae4029ad1&id=221ec240bb&e=16fac31a0f)

To all Iowa law enforcement, thank you for your service!

Mariannette Miller-Meeks

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, ICYMI, last week we We are proud to have a coalition comprised of the men and women who put their lives on the line every day to keep us safe. We are drawing a clear line in the sand between us and our radical opponent, Rita Hart. She has kept silent about our country's police while her democrat colleagues call to defund them. I will never waver in my support for our men and women in uniform and I will actively oppose any bill, amendment or resolution aimed at defunding our police. Period. If you back the blue and want a candidate who will fight for our police, To all Iowa law enforcement, thank you for your service! name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Congressman Bill Archer Endorses Wesley Hunt
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Congressman Bill Archer Endorses Wesley Hunt**

Houston, TX - Today, Wesley had the honor of receiving Congressman Bill Archer's formal endorsement of his campaign in the 7th District. Wesley is humbled by Congressman Archer's support and hopes to live up to the standard of leadership he set during his decades of service. Congressman Archer announced his endorsement of Wesley's campaign in the following letter:

_Dear Residents of the Seventh District,_

__It is my pleasure to share my enthusiastic support for Wesley Hunt in his campaign to be the next Representative for Texas’ Seventh Congressional District. The Seventh District holds a special place in my heart, as I had the honor of holding the seat for 30 years following the tenure of my friend, President George H. W. Bush. My lifetime of service to this District at the local, state, and federal level taught me a great deal about what it takes to protect and defend the interests of Houston. I am confident that Wesley’s leadership and experience uniquely position him to guide Houston through the unprecedented challenges we face today. I strongly support his candidacy and I encourage you to do the same.__

_Wesley Hunt and I have more in common than you may realize. We were both raised in the great city of Houston and both served in the United States Armed Forces. Wesley served as a Captain in the Army and I served as a Captain in the Air Force. After our military service, we both made the decision to return to Houston to continue to serve our city in new ways. Wesley is a native Houstonian and family man who puts the needs of his community ahead of his own, and I believe his ethos as a servant leader will ensure that Houston will have a devoted advocate when Wesley is elected to Congress._

_Not only does Wesley have a tremendous background, but he also has an unwavering commitment to the values that make Houston a city unparalleled in opportunity, quality of life, and healthcare. In order to preserve these aspects of our great city, Houston needs leadership that understands the value of fiscal responsibility. We need leaders who will empower our small business owners, our energy workers, medical professionals, and our entrepreneurs. Our greatest asset is our people, and our government must know when to intervene, and when to get out of the way so that the hardworking people of Houston can take the lead. Wesley represents a new and dynamic generation of leadership that our country -- and Congress -- desperately need._

_We all know that these are unique and challenging times. I encourage you to look to Wesley Hunt as the leader capable of meeting the moment. Please vote for him on November 3 rd!_

_Sincerely,_

_Congressman Bill Archer_
_Representative, Texas’ 7 th Congressional District (1971-2001)_

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=58a6e792c43145ddb9c43f4d8060d289&_e=vU5Wji-BfZ9Nt8clmJkMi-DqHLCxCERxywRtStAARv7SjJdSpp11aQ5kGEIPq56CrHTQw_o2ejUM9cyj5Hg2SbhgfV_NQbd9r086gkewFo2hoZkDDN1ILioWLI1oCj0I3cNvmx4NdXo9bNy6JJSP7F-tK0kO30GgYbEBTiujs8nJfLGc_pzsM2wTDAIkWOHjI5d62TmsoMRzpKglNxtw9s7P2fQOjy9Nyr2CRPEDCOsJuUXCVzeVdxfzDfti1pIk-MR5D5w7xjKROLsGb8u6Q15aJWU9p26_O5Yl80e7oB8%3D)****

But, we’ve only reached a fraction of the voters that we need to before Election Day, which is why I’m asking for your help today.= | | = I appreciate your time and support, Rick \-------- Forwarded message -------- From: Team Kennedy Date: September 3, 2020 Subject: BREAKING: We’re tied! You read that right, team -- a recent poll has Rick in a statistical tie with Pete Sessions. = = Voters from every corner of the district and every political stripe realize that the choice is between Rick’s pragmatic, people-first vision and Pete Sessions’ self-serving agenda. Texans aren’t fooled by Sessions’ clear desire to go back to the Washington swamp, where he was a favorite of corporations and special interests. But he has deep connections in those same groups that he spent decades working for in Washington, and they’ll do anything to get their mouthpiece back in Congress. = If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Kennedy | Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress Rick Kennedy for Congress 2203 Emmett Pkwy Austin, TX 78726 To unsubscribe, please .

| | **[BREAKING: Don Bacon lies about pre-existing condition protections in new TV ad](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e833/77d4c309/21a8db4b/2635e68d/1823094337/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200908_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** Peter, I'm outraged.

Because I know the truth about Don Bacon's despicable record on health care.

And how it has hurt families like mine -- and yours.

**_[I need to run TV ads that expose Bacon's REAL health care record to voters across the district, or his dirty tactics will defeat me. I have to ramp up our spending TODAY, but I need your help raising $9,995 to cover it. Peter, will you rush $5 now? >>](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e833/77d4c309/21a8db4b/2635e68d/1823094337/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20200908_em_fr_b1_kara_all&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")_**

Now that he's in serious danger of losing, he's trying to walk back his reprehensible record.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e833/77d4c309/21a8db4b/2635e6b5/1823094337/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e833/77d4c309/21a8db4b/2635e6b4/1823094337/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e833/77d4c309/21a8db4b/2635e6b7/1823094337/VEsHAw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: Todd Cheewing
subject: TIME IS RUNNING OUT! Have you voted yet?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Don't miss your chance! Tap or click for more info >>
Peter,

Corky and the rest of Team Messner has been out working the polls since early this morning, and we are concerned about voter turnout today.

Corky sent you an email earlier this morning making sure everyone has voted or is planning to vote today. Did you see it? I copied it below in case you missed it.

If you have already cast your vote, _THANK YOU! _

If you haven't yet, **don't delay**. Time is running out, and polls will be closing in a matter of hours.

[_**You can find your polling place at the campaign's official election center. Just click or tap here**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/ae690cc9444a14b4c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

And if you have friends who haven't voted yet, _be sure to forward this email to them_ so they can read why it's so important to make their voice heard today! \- Todd Cheewing, Team Messner | |
---
**From** : Corky Messner
**Sent** : Tuesday, September 8, 2020 6:31 AM
**To** : Todd Cheewing
**Subject** : TODAY IS THE DAY! Where will YOU vote?
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/c4a6148e0d5e0cfdc3d6b838967d376c/33153)
This is it, Todd. Today is the day we've been working towards and working so hard for.

Today is the Republican Primary for New Hampshire's U.S. Senate seat... and **it's critical that you cast your vote if you haven't already**.

If you still don't know where to vote, my team has you covered. They built an official election center online. _**[Just click or tap here to find your nearest polling location](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/9b633f4bd9d3ca2bc3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_.

Polls across the state close at different times, some are open until 7:00 P.M. and some are open until 8:00 P.M. _**[You can find out your poll's hours using the same tool](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/85538d3fb1f1cf31c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/8b90ee3b2330f6c3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
Todd, this is the most important election of our lifetime. When President Trump was in the Granite State, he spoke to this. **He also exclaimed, "We need Corky!"**

And he's right! We need a Pro-Trump, Pro-Liberty, Pro-Small Business candidate who will DEFEAT D.C. Jeanne Shaheen in November's general election and give President Trump the support he needs in the U.S. Senate.

New Hampshire can't afford another six years under Shaheen, and the first step to unseating her begins today.

Again, if you need to find your polling place and its hours, [_**just click or tap here**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/2e13366705d973d7c3d6b838967d376c/33153). Then be sure to go out and VOTE MESSNER!

\- Corky
[Find Your Polling Location!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/5309fd92192f86b0c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/a7c0e16777ba5ea1c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/2755fc22012177c3/2ded94e642d86991c3d6b838967d376c/33153)
---|---
PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE

This email was sent by: Corky Messner
P.O. Box 10370, Bedford, NH, 03110
[Profile Center](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=2755fc22012177c3)
[Unsubscribe](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9&c=33153&jid=2755fc22012177c3)

He’s refusing to accept debates and now he’s resorting to using OUTRIGHT LIES to attack my campaign on paid TV. In his new campaign ad, Ben Ray Lujan states that I do not support covering pre-existing conditions. This could not be further from the truth. I have been clear since DAY ONE of this campaign that I will always fight to ensure that New Mexicans with pre-existing conditions receive the coverage they deserve. I need YOUR help to combat Ben Ray Lujan’s lies and let New Mexicans know I HAVE ALWAYS, AND I WILL ALWAYS SUPPORT COVERAGE FOR NEW MEXICANS WITH PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS. If you can, | | | We all know what Ben Ray is doing. His lies are another brazen attempt at hiding HIS SUPPORT FOR A GOVERNMENT TAKEOVER OF OUR HEALTHCARE SYSTEM. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Not in Our Town? How About 'Not in Our Country'?
body:
Why make excuses for the bullies or justify their violence? Looting is wrong. Vandalism is wrong . . . Yet too many people will not say so. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=7f95126bfc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Not in Our Town? How About 'Not in Our Country'?**

“How the hell can Americans sit back and watch as gangs of dangerous extremists maraud through our cities—burning buildings, throwing rocks, bottles and explosives at police, and attacking the elderly?” Frank Miele writes in _RealClearPolitics_.

“Why make excuses for the bullies or justify their violence? Looting is wrong. Vandalism is wrong. Lawlessness is wrong. Yet too many people will not say so.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3e8b6b9acd&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “No Federal elected official in recent history has taken more significant measures to protect and restore our environment than President Trump,” writes biologist and Florida state legislator Toby Overdorf. “Our President has delivered infrastructure upgrades and investments for numerous environmental restoration projects throughout the country,” including $250 million annually for the Everglades. Read more in [_Florida Politics_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=60cfb5a7c5&e=3ee4985eea) _._

**WATCH LIVE at 3 p.m. ET** : [**President Trump speaks in Jupiter, Florida**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4ad9f58556&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “I'd never met a president before Donald Trump. His empathy and thoughtfulness on one of the worst days of my life won my gratitude,” writes retired Army officer and Gold Star husband Joe Kent, whose wife was killed fighting ISIS in Syria. “President Trump’s actions have shown our troops more respect than any president in my lifetime,” including “his use of decisive military force only when absolutely necessary.” Read more in [NBC News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a3efce0b63&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “One study from 2013 found that, between 1998 and 2009, it took an average of 10.7 years to develop a vaccine. With the coronavirus, however, experts are discussing the possibility of a vaccine in the same year that the pandemic first erupted. It seems we’ll get a vaccine sometime next year at the latest. This is truly historic for both science and medicine,” former Speaker of the House Newt Gingrich writes for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8412ab6660&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e2aa601abf&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b90d0d2804&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=fd7a6cb567)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

That's why we're working day and night to spread Rita's message to every single family in our community. It's more important than ever that we let the people know that Rita is on their side. **[Will you chip in $50, $25 or even just $5 to help our volunteers text, call and reach every single voter in the district? Trump and Republicans are spending a enormous amount of time, energy, and resources in our state because they know it's an essential battleground for 2020. They can't win in 2020 without North Carolina, and our district is one of the top 10 congressional seats most likely to flip this November.

If you can, will you chip in before Trump's rally tonight?**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d2a1/3d199a51/2fb9f02a/73648413/2863794154/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDkwOCIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuYyJ9/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200908?refcode=kme200908_nc_other&refcode2=17426")

Kathy

name: Jon Ossoff (iPhone)
subject: Next stop: Election Day!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Let's kick into high gear |
---
Hi friend,

I hope you were able to enjoy a healthy and relaxing holiday weekend.

For this campaign, Labor Day marks a turning point -- with summer in the rearview mirror and Election Day on the horizon, this is when campaigns traditionally kick into high gear.

**_That's even more true this year, because so many people will be voting well before the sun rises on November 3._**

So I need your help TODAY. We're less than two months out, but as I've said before, with early voting beginning so soon, the Election is already here.

We have to contact every voter before they cast their ballots. _And time is getting short._

**[Friend, can you chip in ANY AMOUNT right now to help us kick this campaign into high gear?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2aa0/5b2c1286/38cfa720/25f09f25/1854636116/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_08_pst_lbr?refcode=em_2020_09_08_pst_lbr")**

body:
**Team Scheller Victory Grassroots Update**
**September 7th** **Last Weeks Update:** This week, the Scheller campaign was excited to welcome 17 new volunteers to the team! These hard-working volunteers knocked on over 3,000 doors and made over 8,000 phone calls this week. Keep up the good work Team Scheller! Join the team by signing up [HERE](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=25177f75a96c4826a91497f64d2a3750&_e=R3vZ0xdxkSP4Uh_Tc-EdlAhyJQI2CV92dVwcyMQE-4GuqaioBxMvjfjO8vyEe53eDIJr0e2LAd1UJqU_XLGgwyN9UVKGMYhylp56NBgmgtuZIsBWq9OidZWRe54kHknaQLrSjyUDsbEza3-wvRzFtnQ7MZ7usH7_KJ1pUkposiO-38Jyl1P_lWqECBkA2zW7Yvb77Jg_i6waEPAe-_hYGT04G0Wmlig6H09Oi2MBnIlHAlrgiW7CQLZpJZ4PNyXmEts61yI_AKcXzLfxLVfpIiXHwapxGa1LP9Nv3e1PbRA%3D) This week we had two very successful phone banks and three great door-knocking events. Last week, as a part of the White House's celebration of National Alcohol and Drug Addiction Recovery Month, Lisa Scheller attended the Recovery at Work roundtable discussion on recovery-friendly workplaces. Lisa Scheller is the founder of Hope and Coffee located in Tamaqua, PA. This wonderful non-profit organization helps employe addicts in early recovery and has a mission to end the stigma that surrounds being in recovery. In addition to this, the Scheller Campaign was proud to roll out another three coalitions; Police for Scheller, Outdoorsmen for Scheller, and Latinos for Scheller. **Ramiro Osuna** “I am a political science major going in my junior year at Muhlenberg College. I am from New Jersey but I currently reside in Allentown Pennsylvania. I joined the campaign to help Lisa get into office as our next Congresswoman because I firmly believe that she will protect the values here in PA07.” Ramiro will be knocking on doors, making phone calls, and training new volunteers. Excited to have you on Team Scheller! **Volunteer of the Week**
**Shawn Welch, Hellertown PA.** Shawn Welch is a volunteer from Hellertown and is also chairman of Veterans for Scheller. Shawn was in the Army for 31 years as a Colonel. Thank you for your service.

“Lisa’s success as a business owner with global in many countries demonstrates she has a firm understanding of international relations and the importance of America’s position in the world. Lisa has an in-depth understanding of and strongly supports issues that matter to veterans and those in service to our nation. She listens to these men and women and will work for effective solutions to the problems that plague veterans’ benefits. That is why I stand behind Lisa Scheller.”
Great work, Shawn! Thank you for your support. Hope you had a great Labor Day Weekend Have a great Tuesday! -Team Scheller Paid for by Lisa Scheller for Congress, Inc. name: Team LaHood
subject: Darin needs you to see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
November 3rd won’t be a run-of-the-mill trip to the ballot box. Our votes this year could change the course of history, and Darin needs you | |
---
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=523884b3b4f74e77b4e85bbef6963256&_e=5dTJUxcg3_kuwWjc7hHyc-NmXFXtiGBvXIEEpm9f6svYtTV30Ig0mlf7VMMaSqAR_a_j5AE6NQd7zA-2nyyQS-YXWrdzqhzIiM81ddnrLiM_pWQZQxwUtQ0Ww4vD5VfKcH7rzswvIXOdRCSOjOXAB_YOqI5CXGu1W2SgvFhgGU2pQINhX0KcK0n4v7eOoPJHoG5LqFcjKylYMd-BwTMNchOrcCD8cFsH6OiQ5pambdPYQozaL-iGTigi0b6UoffpZlqNQPXaBy5pKFP__6uh3781nSbtIrgJrW1XTITK2Mg7M06xXxGdtS3KGN2Xgak82Y38jr2-Xhib7XXCz1sg8IXqc2xyba-QhgzkYuhSe-jxfrxhhZzCJrXcfbi_yjqpIXHilUjPxQK57Q51tVqjNTPZY8DkMSYjjqYio-FTUi83JOHvriMVzELwl51L9ISEouZdlGmjXLTvvlmwrip4aKKavp1z4ekbIyxe9A0l8Fc%3D)
|
---
Friend,

We’re sure that you know by now that November’s elections won’t be a run-of-the-mill trip to the ballot box.

The votes that we’ll be casting this year are carrying extra weight – and with everything that’s at stake in this election, **our votes could change the course of history.**

_That’s exactly the message that Darin has in his latest video – and with Illinois early voting starting in just**three weeks,** he needs you to see this._
[ ](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=523884b3b4f74e77b4e85bbef6963256&_e=5dTJUxcg3_kuwWjc7hHyc-NmXFXtiGBvXIEEpm9f6svYtTV30Ig0mlf7VMMaSqAR_a_j5AE6NQd7zA-2nyyQS-YXWrdzqhzIiM81ddnrLiM_pWQZQxwUtQ0Ww4vD5VfKcH7rzswvIXOdRCSOjOXAB_YOqI5CXGu1W2SgvFhgGU2pQINhX0KcK0n4v7eOoPJHoG5LqFcjKylYMd-BwTMNchOrcCD8cFsH6OiQ5pambdPYQozaL-iGTigi0b6UoffpZlqNQPXaBy5pKFP__6uh35NRXl_r7sjh75Zh_O_I3uMiUjypjQL_xSthexJ-I8kBgNWRhEGQbOpAFPtcSVMa_WqNbABSoLA8MwR90wRgKYdEhtdzSnpJUwdP49lts2jzZzA5QXvqnr2nH2Gmvs0gTbzyDY03Nh5BRI6lnFdbNzX6Qz_54vtsnCcMCOhCmfWqp0Ty5DmsUFUR-_Ka3WX431F8UojloDBw2zsiK4OFf6g%3D)
[**WATCH THE FULL VIDEO AND CHIP IN TO SUPPORT DARIN**](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=523884b3b4f74e77b4e85bbef6963256&_e=5dTJUxcg3_kuwWjc7hHyc-NmXFXtiGBvXIEEpm9f6svYtTV30Ig0mlf7VMMaSqAR_a_j5AE6NQd7zA-2nyyQS-YXWrdzqhzIiM81ddnrLiM_pWQZQxwUtQ0Ww4vD5VfKcH7rzswvIXOdRCSOjOXAB_YOqI5CXGu1W2SgvFhgGU2pQINhX0KcK0n4v7eOoPJHoG5LqFcjKylYMd-BwTMNchOrcCD8cFsH6OiQ5pambdPYQozaL-iGTigi0b6UoffpZlqNQPXaBy5pKFP__6uh36Krz5Pb1I4DUKizygfmKsj4rIffCFJznOsJvLAuxW7iJqzbmVbo3hkL3J495BH25jkw7EqY5l7eFrkbReiW2whMxcNH6Hc1fg_wcKu-NSjfmtGlD-THsXBwlh0W83nBIf0axq0b-hSgUCLT5PIux7Afb27uYRYDgPFZzcpReqV6wfzjDVpMv1jXX_D3rh7249d12lPO_3yOm4sRJxMesiI%3D)
**_Will we elect leaders who stand up to the Chinese Communist Party – or ones who bow down to them?_**

**_Will we take back Congress from Nancy Pelosi – or let her decades-long rule continue for another two years?_**

name: Judicial Watch NewsLink
subject: State Department Official Used Personal Email to Push Steele Reports
body: Background on Jonathan Winer's destruction of documents at State [NEWSLINK] BREAKING NEWS... [600x300] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=20384&F=T&] The mysterious destruction of evidence related to Steele's dossier, State Department contacts [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=20384&F=T&] Source: Just The News [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=20384&F=T&] "It looks like Steele was a foreign influence operation," said Kevin Brock, former assistant director of intelligence at the FBI. "He was injecting information from Russia, Ukraine, or whoever was feeding him or paying him." Brock said Jonathan Winer's admitted destruction of some of the Steele documents was disturbing. Winer is a former top aide to Secretary of State John Kerry. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=20384&F=T&] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=20384&F=T&] Background Notes from Judicial Watch [180x150x1] State Department Official Used Personal Email to Push Steele Reports [13x13x1] READ MORE [180x150x2] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=15562&F=T&] 2019-09-19 Documents Reveal Extensive Relationship Between Dossier Author Steele and Top Obama State Department Officials [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=15562&F=T&] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=15562&F=T&] State Department documents reveal that British spy and dossier author Christopher Steele had a close relationship with high-ranking Obama State Department officials. From May 2014 to November 2015, Steele filed dozens of reports with his close associate, Special Coordinator for Libya Jonathan Winer, who passed them to Assistant Secretary of State Victoria Nuland. [13x13x1] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=15562&F=T&] READ MORE [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=15562&F=T&] [180x150x3] [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=16115&F=T&] 2019-10-31 Documents Reveal Obama State Department Official in Contact with Russian Embassy One Month Before Trump Inauguration [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=16115&F=T&] Source: Judicial Watch [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51352&L=16115&F=T&] Twenty-eight days before the inauguration of President Trump, Special Coordinator for Libya Jonathan Winer had a 10-minute phone call with Alexey Vladimirovich Skosyrev, the “political chief” at the Russian Embassy in Washington, DC. You won’t want to miss Senator Cory Booker kicking off tonight’s phone bank with Beto as we connect with voters across Texas this evening.
#
Hey Friend, we wanted to make sure you saw that Senator Cory Booker will be kicking off our phone bank tonight.
We couldn’t be more thrilled that, during his own re-election campaign, Sen. Booker is choosing to speak with our volunteers tonight. _Why is he doing that?_ Because he knows we can flip Texas if we put in the work.
[**Don’t miss out on hearing from Sen. Booker tonight – sign up right now to be added to the RSVP list!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43035?source=ema20200908-104400&t=1&akid=104400%2E444211%2Ez2HSll)

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19062833/248407603/1001356148?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJlMzYyZi0yMmYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vr0FrDX_J8L7TfXbG8aOFE8MqpQLtm174VM6h7K8nLo=&emci=f3b6e435-0bf2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=cf2e362f-22f2-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=8780864)
Friend,

Last week, our team reached out to remind you that Election Day is just under two months away, and we're going up against huge amounts of spending by our opponent and her family.

I'm not going to let that spending stop me from running -- because I know who we need in Congress, and it's not someone who's buying this seat.

I'm fighting so hard to become your representative -- because you deserve a representative that knows you.

You deserve someone who'll best represent _you_ in Congress -- someone who's familiar with financial hardships. Someone who may look like you. Someone who takes the same public transportation as you. **Someone who's willing to fight the good fight** because they know what it's like to struggle, even with working multiple jobs.

**That someone is me** \-- and because we come from the same community with similar experiences, in Congress, I'm beholden to you and only you -- _never_ billionaires.

**[Chip in $5 or whatever you can to our grassroots campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19062834/248407604/-132536200?refcode=em20_200908_2months2inactives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJlMzYyZi0yMmYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vr0FrDX_J8L7TfXbG8aOFE8MqpQLtm174VM6h7K8nLo=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19062835/248407605/-132536200?refcode=em20_200908_2months2inactives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjJlMzYyZi0yMmYyLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vr0FrDX_J8L7TfXbG8aOFE8MqpQLtm174VM6h7K8nLo=) As always, I'm here for you. Stay safe and healthy!

\-- Georgette Gómez

Team,

2 months. 61 Days. 1,448 hours.

**Election Day is getting closer and closer -- and we've got _no_ time to waste. **

We're ramping up every aspect of our campaign -- but it's tough going up against our opponent's _huge_ amounts of spending. Like $841,000 in spending by her grandparents for October (and more on the way if she wants it!).

**[We have no time to waste -- we need to raise $3,467 to cover our next media buy to keep pace with our opponent's spending. clean_body: | Friend, Last week, our team reached out to remind you that Election Day is just under two months away, and we're going up against huge amounts of spending by our opponent and her family. I'm not going to let that spending stop me from running -- because I know who we need in Congress, and it's not someone who's buying this seat. I'm fighting so hard to become your representative -- because you deserve a representative that knows you. You deserve someone who'll best represent you in Congress -- someone who's familiar with financial hardships. Someone who may look like you. Someone who takes the same public transportation as you. Someone who's willing to fight the good fight because they know what it's like to struggle, even with working multiple jobs. That someone is me \-- and because we come from the same community with similar experiences, in Congress, I'm beholden to you and only you -- never billionaires. = = As always, I'm here for you. Stay safe and healthy! \-- Georgette Gómez \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Gómez Date: September 3rd, 2020 Subject: The clock is ticking Team, 2 months. 61 Days. 1,448 hours. Election Day is getting closer and closer -- and we've got no time to waste. We're ramping up every aspect of our campaign -- but it's tough going up against our opponent's huge amounts of spending. Like $841,000 in spending by her grandparents for October (and more on the way if she wants it!). = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Getting on the air is crucial for this campaign. We can't hold in person events, and one of the most efficient ways to spread the word about Georgette is by getting up on TV. But we don't have billionaire grandparents to help fund our ad buy. = = Thanks for your continued support, Team Gómez | Georgette Gómez is the first LGBTQ Latina elected San Diego City Council President. Now, she's running for Congress to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda and recenter our focus on working families in our community. Georgette is the only candidate in the race for CA-53 to be endorsed by the California Democratic Party. Email is the best way to stay up to date with Georgette's campaign. To support Georgette's campaign please =. We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Georgette! Paid for by Georgette Gomez for Congress Georgette Gómez for Congress 1111 Sixth Ave. #317 San Diego, CA 92101 United States

body:
BIG NEWS: Dana was just endorsed by Georgia’s Democratic Senate challenger, Jon Ossoff! |
---
| | [ ](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=c9fb6fb107&e=e25784ff28)
---
| | **BIG NEWS: Dana was just endorsed by Georgia’s Democratic Senate challenger, Jon Ossoff! ** Not only did Jon lead a historic campaign in 2017, but he was able to mobilize the strongest Democratic Special Election turnout in over a decade. If anyone knows how to flip Georgia, it’s Jon – and we’re so excited to have him on our team. [**Will you stand with Jon and help us flip Georgia’s 11th district by donating $11 right now? → **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=4547f12e9d&e=e25784ff28) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

---

But here’s the thing , when we get major endorsements, like Jon Ossoff, all eyes turn to our campaign. The GOP, Super PACs, and Barry Loudermilk will be watching our campaign closely this week to see if Jon’s endorsement convinces more of their supporters to vote for Dana.
That means that we need to show Loudermilk and his Trump cronies that they should be worried because we know that we can flip this district.
**Dana knows it, Jon knows it, and so does Loudermilk. **
Jon understands what it takes to make the GOP nervous. His challenge of longtime Georgia Senator David Perdue has Republican leaders like Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump worried. They know that this November there will be a reckoning and the American people will make sure that a blue wave comes crashing into DC.
But, to make that happen, we need all hands on deck as we continue to push Dana’s platform and get our message out to the people of GA-11 that Dana should be their next Congresswoman. America needs leaders in Washington, like Dana and Jon, to help get our nation back on track. The best way for you to help is by chipping in to our grassroots fund right now.
[**So , help us get to DC this November by donating $11 to our grassroots fund today! **](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=d58462e3b0&e=e25784ff28)
**[DONATE $11](https://electdanabarrett.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=602de950cf46fed73b950456c&id=86265bfea7&e=e25784ff28)**
---

Let’s flip this state!
– Team Barrett
