name: Joe Biden
subject: My first September newsletter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
What a whirlwind it has been since I accepted your nomination at the Democratic National Convention. |
---
|
---
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/357066a8/1390053006/VEsH/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/")
_Below is Joe Biden 's newsletter for September 8, 2020. Please submit questions and feedback **[here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/357066a7/1390053006/VEsE/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/newsletter-form?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")**_
Peter --

What a whirlwind it has been since I accepted your nomination at the Democratic National Convention.

We watched the Republican convention -- where they flouted public health guidelines, seemingly forgot about the more than 180,000 American lives lost due to COVID-19, and stoked more hatred and division.

Then, we turned around and got right back to work.

We celebrated Women's Equality Day and the 100th anniversary of the 19th Amendment, which gave some women the right to vote. We reflected on the original March on Washington held 57 years ago, and we continued to strive for a more perfect union to ensure Americans are judged not by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character.

And we continued to lay out for people what is at stake in this battle for the soul of the nation. I'm glad to be traveling -- safely -- to speak directly with voters when I can, and I'm thankful to all of the organizers and volunteers helping to spread our positive message of change across the country.

I'm excited to share with you everything else that my campaign has been doing over the last few weeks. For now, I hope you are safe and healthy. And though we weren't able to hold parades for Labor Day (and I really missed running through those this year), I hope you were able to celebrate the holiday!
**Campaign Updates**

After making history by nominating Kamala Harris and holding the first virtual Democratic National Convention, we made history one more time in August by raising $364.5 million dollars to power this campaign.

I'm so grateful to every single person who has shown their faith in me by donating their hard-earned dollars. And I'm particularly proud to say that 95% of those contributions were from grassroots donors.

[We reached that historic fundraising total because 1.5 million new donors chipped in for the first time last month. But we can't let the momentum slow now. Can you help us keep making history by chipping in to my campaign today?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

| [Other ➞](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
Peter, you and I know we need a president who will work to lower the temperature in trying times -- not raise it. A president who will bring people together and find solutions to the challenges we face.

That's what I went to Kenosha, Wisconsin, to do last week, and it's what I'll do every day in the White House. You can click the image below to watch the full community conversation I held:
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/357066a0/1390053006/VEsHBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=TrfxgrGEY4A")
Last week I also discussed what a real roadmap to reopen our schools would look like. We all want students back in the classroom, but President Trump hasn't done the work to make sure schools can reopen safely and effectively. Kamala Harris and I will be ready on Day One with a roadmap for reopening, and I hope you'll join me in demanding we do better to protect teachers, students, and staff:
| [Read the Roadmap to Reopening Schools Safely](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/3570669f/1390053006/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/school-reopening/")
---
Speaking of teachers, my wife Jill held a grassroots fundraiser with our daughter Ashley, some of our grandchildren -- and the cast of Queer Eye. They talked about how Finnegan and Maisy are adapting to remote college classes, and Jonathan, Karamo, Tan, Antoni, and Bobby each shared different ways people can get involved with this campaign and make a difference in November.

I know Jill was particularly moved by Tan's story of recently becoming a U.S. citizen, and how forcefully he asked everyone not to take for granted the right to vote.

**That fundraiser may be over, but you can still click the photo below to make a donation to the campaign:**
[](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
I also had the pleasure of sitting down with my running mate Kamala Harris for a socially distanced conversation. We talked about how we're going to build back better, and how we will do it while creating a brighter future for you and your families. You can click the photo below to watch our full conversation about how we are going to move forward -- together.
[](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/3570669e/1390053006/VEsHAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=nIT0NIzZT6I")
**What 's Coming**

After speaking about the power of good, union jobs yesterday for Labor Day, I'll keep talking about my plans to build our country and our economy back better than it was before this pandemic. Tomorrow, I'll head to Michigan to do just that.

Peter, I know Kamala emailed you yesterday to ask if you would show your support for our Build Back Better plan. Today, I'm asking you to do the same thing. If Labor Day has left you ready to create millions of good-paying union jobs and build a new American economy for our families and the next generation, can you add your name today?
| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b265/1cd0ac28/15ec39fd7/3570669d/1390053006/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/PET-build-back-better?source=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")
---
The other thing that Labor Day marks is a turning point in presidential campaigns. I know from my 2008 and 2012 campaigns with President Obama that, even though us candidates start campaigning months and months before, so many people only tune in to the election now, with less than two months to go.

That's why my advertising and organizing teams are ramping up like never before. And with ballots being sent to voters _right now_ in some battleground states, there's no time to waste.

**I don 't need to tell you again that we're a grassroots campaign, but I really mean it when I say I'm counting on grassroots supporters stepping up today to help power our critical work.**

[If you can afford to, will you make your first donation to my campaign at this critical time?](https://go.joebiden.%3D%3D/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_sept2020?refcode=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=100&amounts=50,100,250,500&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_INFO_2020.09.08_B2_newsletter_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Peter, that's all for now.

With less than two months until November 3rd, we really are in the final stretch of this campaign, and I'm so glad to have you by my side.

These next few weeks won't be easy, but I know that -- together -- we can choose hope over fear and win this battle for the soul of the nation.

So again, thank you, thank you, thank you for being on my team. Whether you joined us last week or last year, Kamala and I have been so moved by your support as we began the official general election, and now I know we can bring it home.

Stay healthy and safe,

Joe

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

Please submit questions and feedback "" Peter -- What a whirlwind it has been since I accepted your nomination at the Democratic National Convention. We watched the Republican convention -- where they flouted public health guidelines, seemingly forgot about the more than 180,000 American lives lost due to COVID-19, and stoked more hatred and division. Then, we turned around and got right back to work. We celebrated Women's Equality Day and the 100th anniversary of the 19th Amendment, which gave some women the right to vote. We reflected on the original March on Washington held 57 years ago, and we continued to strive for a more perfect union to ensure Americans are judged not by the color of their skin, but by the content of their character. And we continued to lay out for people what is at stake in this battle for the soul of the nation. I'm glad to be traveling -- safely -- to speak directly with voters when I can, and I'm thankful to all of the organizers and volunteers helping to spread our positive message of change across the country. I'm excited to share with you everything else that my campaign has been doing over the last few weeks. For now, I hope you are safe and healthy. And though we weren't able to hold parades for Labor Day (and I really missed running through those this year), I hope you were able to celebrate the holiday! name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Friend, are you planning on voting absentee?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
In case you were thinking about voting absentee this year, we wanted to make sure that you had all the resources you need to make that happen. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend,

Election Day is coming up fast, and November 3rd will be here before you know it.

If you are thinking about voting absentee this year, we want to make sure that you have all the resources you need to make that happen. Our crew pulled together all the relevant reasons, deadlines, and resources you’ll need!

**Reasons:**
* Check **[here](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2effc69104cc4c1bb51d728a8a4f1d5c&_e=VOBM6rkK4Ppm0_utjxBVA_VKtMUD24J6arbYzYpHUhMRMy6hLlH0Oz1uA1BT3PN7NW9TXnIN1_5PB_UUTGlN86nQayu2uvJqk-FySfNZHYJSW02ANTTOkrBvTerGTplV3ovDDK_syenxCGw_I2MPa9NIQy0qhiCB4rOhOO8gHejxecPE4K3BJU8yybKng-aj0lnep6BOy3e3q5Qb_lOyDqBu5tyfAl9z37yGmpm9wy2PhxaOiqv0FaX2juG_wWDXfoANB0btoTvUjS2FsPpjW7BwlLwUwjGrRZXS1zzW5L0RqHKU-5XfIfahdrizoTX3pfroRv_2ayyDqCBrDH4cAiDbWOAaOWqoxMFTkFwpSYqJXEaBqtu6uj4mRt6-YXsBF9JLhUgyy1P6fBHFaRC0ilo5D-8tAxkUBX6nvZCwHKT6tPNeVLb6EeTNZwIF0R0nyDFtSIqkM0gwAsIpzMtgDyMl7vhjU8Xg-WlVrvh9rIE%3D)** to see the 11 requirements for requesting an absentee by-mail ballot. These reasons were established by the Indiana General Assembly.

**Important deadlines:**
* **Statewide voter registration:** October 5
* **Recommended last date to mail in absentee application:** October 19
* **Absentee ballot application must be received by clerk:** October 22
* **Recommended last date to mail completed absentee ballot:** October 27
* **Absentee ballot must be received by clerk:** Noon on November 3

**Voting absentee by-mail is secure -- with longtime protocols in place that protect the sanctity of your vote.**

You can request your absentee ballot securely online, with **[step-by-step directions here.](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=2effc69104cc4c1bb51d728a8a4f1d5c&_e=VOBM6rkK4Ppm0_utjxBVA6Sux02NBr5-D0hYzQ-oYqhknWEbA2snFTbMU7QwG4kb0kPuQSooZOR4IfQVdD_eeih3g6xIK5y99N7CZqZCRbI4Cb1tCOsuolERkddajx-kpNDAa9LmUgDEC2t-d22Fc44u4eHnpvX43fFdMiD2bHZAYucZPdgxOjxKxD8rbLfo_NrOcv3bgoaG4RQ_eVEf5EQeDPvAAI7FW88XvY2KGVk0A4nNybeO118dZhTj8CfJ0cYYHypL-pMbIl1D8Z-pI0aCUkT7tQNIkLkoguw1rfgZYqwWx4uEs6egkPDxmdAHJG6gL-zCI92LWen4hUtFJHsCnXrpYwvGi-DI2OuCEFuJmjf_SszZSpGFS_ZV6To4Xe213K9UlX7XDI3PUXtYoY9HKCZz8-tnF_K4cQ2e7fhJ-OyXPVhAPcgpwwmBXV6HrYiJUlzUm3YHti2KQuUhXA%3D%3D)**

If you’d like to mail your form, download an absentee ballot application or get more information on how to vote in Indiana, follow the button below.

name: Bill Olson
subject: We don't play in Florida
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I live in Central Florida, not far from Orlando. We are a law and order suburban community, a swing district! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

The Biden Riots may have roots in hole-in-the-ground communities like Portland or Seattle, but we here in Central Florida don't take well to that stuff here!

What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it.

The story of Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, breaks my heart. He was being violently attacked and he used the Second Amendment to defend himself.

The liberals defended the murderous rioters and villified this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him.

The riots started in my district too. But law enforcement here was having none of it, and we put these idiots down!

Check out the words of Polk County Sheriff Judd, in referring to the unrest in my district:

“The reason [for Monday’s continued curfew] is clear – we’ve had criminal conduct afoot," Sheriff Judd said. "We’ve had citizens injured, windows broken, and we’ve had other attempts at assaulting law enforcement officers and assaulting buildings that we repelled. And there are curfews in other communities, and we certainly don’t want to create a vacuum for people to come here when there’s a curfew in another area.”

He went on to say that if you needed to be out during the curfew because of work or another emergency, the "curfew's not for you." Instead, "it's for the lawless people that would wreak havoc in the community."

Sheriff Judd also had a stern message for anyone who might come to the county to riot, loot, or injure people.

"I would tell them if you value your life, you probably shouldn’t do that in Polk County, because the people of Polk County like guns, they have guns, and I encourage them to own guns, and they’re going to be in their homes tonight with their guns loaded. And if you try to break into their homes, to steal, to set fires, I’m highly recommending they blow you back out of their house with their guns. So leave the community alone, and we’ll do our best to support the community."

Sheriff Judd speaks for all of us. If you come to Central Florida to destroy our communities and kill our people, we will not treat you with kid gloves like Seattle or Portland's weak mayors. We will use our Second Amendment rights, just like Kyle Rittenhouse did!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

The extremist Dems and the Fake News will call us all kind of names. If they were willing to destroy the lives of two minor children- Kyle Rittenhouse and Nick Sandmann- they will certainly try to smear us.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

The extreme Left actively hates us. If they gain power this year, kiss good bye to your gun rights! They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it.

Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President!

It's the extremists or us. That's why we MUST win this year!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the extremists and I'll fight for our liberties.

Last week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She wants the rioters to attack us and harm our families. The Democrats may enjoy playing games with our families and their safety, but I don't!

But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

Are YOU a loyal American? Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November!

If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now!

I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Antifa!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ
This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ
today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=ijK7dN32fF6OuRU&b=qoacK6FZ51ByBV_6Pb8niQ

P.S. I really need your help today

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who just overwhelmingly won my primary, by 20 points! I live in Central Florida, not far from Orlando. We are a law and order suburban community, a swing district! I will stand shoulder to shoulder with President Trump as we fight far-Left extremist Socialism! The Biden Riots may have roots in hole-in-the-ground communities like Portland or Seattle, but we here in Central Florida don't take well to that stuff here! What happened in Kenosha, Wisconsin is the best example of why we NEED the Second Amendment, and why we must fight this year to protect it. The story of Kyle Rittenhouse, a young man who works in Kenosha, breaks my heart. He was being violently attacked and he used the Second Amendment to defend himself. The liberals defended the murderous rioters and villified this kid. They attacked him because he did not allow a crazed, violent mob to kill him. The riots started in my district too. But law enforcement here was having none of it, and we put these idiots down! Check out the words of Polk County Sheriff Judd, in referring to the unrest in my district: “The reason [for Monday’s continued curfew] is clear – we’ve had criminal conduct afoot," Sheriff Judd said. "We’ve had citizens injured, windows broken, and we’ve had other attempts at assaulting law enforcement officers and assaulting buildings that we repelled. And there are curfews in other communities, and we certainly don’t want to create a vacuum for people to come here when there’s a curfew in another area.” He went on to say that if you needed to be out during the curfew because of work or another emergency, the "curfew's not for you." Instead, "it's for the lawless people that would wreak havoc in the community." Sheriff Judd also had a stern message for anyone who might come to the county to riot, loot, or injure people. "I would tell them if you value your life, you probably shouldn’t do that in Polk County, because the people of Polk County like guns, they have guns, and I encourage them to own guns, and they’re going to be in their homes tonight with their guns loaded. And if you try to break into their homes, to steal, to set fires, I’m highly recommending they blow you back out of their house with their guns. So leave the community alone, and we’ll do our best to support the community." Sheriff Judd speaks for all of us. If you come to Central Florida to destroy our communities and kill our people, we will not treat you with kid gloves like Seattle or Portland's weak mayors. We will use our Second Amendment rights, just like Kyle Rittenhouse did! Image The extremist Dems and the Fake News will call us all kind of names. If they were willing to destroy the lives of two minor children- Kyle Rittenhouse and Nick Sandmann- they will certainly try to smear us. Image The extreme Left actively hates us. If they gain power this year, kiss good bye to your gun rights! They hate our Second Amendment and they want to slime this kid because of it. Here's the good news: The American people see this. They are rallying behind our American President! It's the extremists or us. That's why we MUST win this year! Image I won't be afraid to fight. I'll fight the extremists and I'll fight for our liberties. Last week, Nancy Pelosi called us Republicans "enemies of the state". She wants the rioters to attack us and harm our families. The Democrats may enjoy playing games with our families and their safety, but I don't! But I have taken an oath to the Constitution- one that has no expiration date! I am a patriot and I need your help to counter the media's lies! Are YOU a loyal American? Help me replace Socialist Darren Soto, and stand up for our freedoms as Americans! I am now the official Republican nominee, and I need your help to win in November! If I win, Nancy Pelosi will almost certainly not be speaker. Help me now! I need your help to stand up FOR the Constitution and AGAINST Antifa! Can you help me? This is a swing suburban district and we can take it back! Can I count on you for a donation today? Time is running out- that's why I need your help today! I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. name: Sandy Smith
subject: Pelosi the hypocrite
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:
| | | [ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g)
---

Dear Peter,

**I am Sandy Smith, the Republican nominee for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district. I am a business owner and I think it's long past time to open the economy!**

Anyone with an ounce of common sense can see that, if murderous Antifa rioters can gather night after night, then reasonable people can gather and conduct commerce. Shops can open, people can work, students can go to school, and life can go on!
The Democrats can't let life go on. If life goes on, they lose their crazy tyrannical Covid lockdowns.
You know the worst part of those anti-liberty lockdowns? The Democrats only want the common people to be under them, but they don't want to be subject to the restrictions themselves!
_**In Chicago, the nutty Mayor Lightfoot got her hair done at a salon while shutting down salons to ordinary people.**_
_Chicago Mayor Lori Lightfoot, a Democrat, defended a haircut she received recently despite salons and barbershops shutting down under the state’s stay-at-home order.
Lightfoot was criticized for her actions after previously stating in one of her public service announcements that “ _getting your roots done is not essential_ ,” according to the Chicago Tribune.
The controversy began when the stylist posted photos with the mayor on Facebook last weekend, thanking her for her hard work and saying she had the “pleasure of giving Mayor Lightfoot a hair trim.”
The stylist was wearing a mask and gloves, the mayor said in defense of her haircut during a press conference earlier this week. “I’m the public face of this city. _I’m on national media and I’m out in the public eye._ ”_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g)
---

_Now, Nancy Pelosi has done the same thing- after criticizing President Trump for not being tough on Covid, Pelosi demanded a hair salon open FOR HER ONLY:_

_House Speaker Nancy Pelosi visited a San Francisco hair salon on Monday afternoon for a wash and blow-out, despite local ordinances keeping salons closed amid the coronavirus pandemic, Fox News has learned.

In security footage obtained by Fox News, and timestamped Monday at 3:08 p.m. Pacific Time, _the California powerhouse is seen walking through ESalonSF in San Francisco with wet hair, and without a mask over her mouth or nose._

The stylist doing her hair can be seen following her wearing a black face mask.

Salons in San Francisco had been closed since March and were only notified they could reopen on Sept. 1 for outdoor hairstyling services only._

**_When confronted with the obvious hypocrisy of her actions, you know what Pelosi did? She had the nerve to blame the salon owner!_**

_Nancy Pelosi is speaking out, demanding an apology from the hair salon in San Francisco.

Pelosi got her hair done Monday before hair salons were allowed to operate in the Bay Area.

That salon is owned by a Fresno native Erica Kious. Kious also provides hair services near Palm and Nees Avenues.

The general manager of Sola Salon Studios says she’s a good person who got caught in the crossfire, but Pelosi throwing Kious’ salon in the San Francisco under the bus.

“ _This salon owes me an apology for setting up, we trusted a neighbor salon that I’ve been to for years,_ ” Pelosi said.

The salon controversy continues after a video surfaced of the Speaker of The House, was seen getting her hair done in San Francisco on Monday._

_Those of us around in the 1990s may remember DC Mayor Marion Barry, when caught smoking crack with a prostitute, claiming "B*tch set me up!"._

This is about as bad as that. But this is what Democrats do, isn't it? After all, Barry was re-elected twice more AFTER being caught!

**Pelosi's Democrats don't care about you or your health. They just want to control you with rules that they themselves don't obey!**

[If you agree with me, I need your help to beat Pelosi's deputy whip Butterfield!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g) Unlike Pelosi and Butterfield, I know what everyday Americans go through. I'll re-open the economy!

[Can you help me take this swing district back](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g), with your best and immediate contribution of $15, $35, or $250? Taking out my opponent, one of Pelosi’s leading lieutenants, would be a crippling blow to the Democrat Socialists and to Nancy Pelosi’s agenda.

G.K. Butterfield is awful, but to replace him I [really need you today](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g)! Let's stand up to these hypocrites now, before it's too late!

For God and Country,
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g)
---
Sandy Smith
Republican for Congress, North Carolina's new First District
Conservative
Entrepreneur & Military mom
[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g)
---
P.S. [Will you contribute $15, $60, $250, or your largest contribution?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=gNOIGpbyY3Nxmng&b=qOpS5MMblJZ3sWvkU78P5g) I need to reach my goal to catch up with Butterfield.

clean_body: | | | | Peter, All New Mexicans, born and unborn, deserve the right to become their full potential. As your Senator, I will always be a strong supporter of pro-life legislation and the strongest opponent of radical late-term abortion policies that are championed by Ben Ray Lujan. New Mexico Alliance for Life knows that my support for life is steadfast and built on my strong Christian Faith. I am proud to announce that they have endorsed me for US Senate! If you want a champion for life in the US Senate, | Sadly, my opponent, Ben Ray Lujan, does not fight for the unborn. In fact, ensuring that women can terminate their pregnancies at any point in their pregnancy is a core part of my opponent’s platform. If the Democrats take the Senate in 2021, Chuck Schumer and Ben Ray Lujan will work to eliminate New Mexico’s ability to write it’s own abortion laws. This Senate election is make or break for the pro-life movement. If you can, | | | Thank you for your support, Mark P.S. If you are pro-life please spread the word with your friends, family, at your church and in your community that I am the only pro-life candidate in this race. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Another major deal! How President Trump brought Serbia and Kosovo together
body:
President Trump met with Serbian President Aleksandar Vučić and Kosovan Prime Minister Avdullah Hoti at the White House on Friday... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1f9fd37a5f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 8, 2020
---
| | |
# **Another major deal! How President Trump brought Serbia and Kosovo together**

**President Trump** met with Serbian President Aleksandar Vučić and Kosovan Prime Minister Avdullah Hoti at the White House on Friday, where the leaders announced a historic commitment to economic normalization between Serbia and Kosovo.

**“By focusing on job creation** and economic growth, the two countries were able to reach a major breakthrough—something that nobody thought was going to be possible,” President Trump said.

🎬 [**WATCH: President Trump decided to try something creative and new**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=703cde0c63&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump’s Administration** has delivered recently on a number of major peacemaking deals. The agreement between Kosovo and Serbia follows just weeks after another huge breakthrough brokered between Israel and the United Arab Emirates.

**A key side benefit** of the Serbia-Kosovo deal, National Security Advisor Robert O’Brien said on Friday, is that it now allows for “the establishment of diplomatic relations between Kosovo, a majority-Muslim state, and the State of Israel.”

**In the Oval Office** , President Vučić and Prime Minister Hoti thanked President Trump and his team for their commitment to peace and stability in the region.

**“I look forward** to seeing Serbia and Kosovo prosper as we work together on economic cooperation in the region. Going forward—I look forward to going to both countries someday in the not-too-distant future,” President Trump said.

📖 [**Serbia-Kosovo deal comes from Trump's different brand of diplomacy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e42df14633&e=3ee4985eea)

🎬 [**President Trump is reversing 20 years of bad Middle East policy**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=84ed8fc641&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **Great American Comeback continues as unemployment rate falls**

**It’s official:** The U.S. economy added nearly 1.4 million jobs last month, bringing the total to 10.6 million jobs created since May. All told, that accounts for about 50 percent of all jobs lost during the Coronavirus pandemic.

**“We’re currently witnessing** the fastest labor market recovery from an economic crisis in history—world history,” President Trump said at a Labor Day press conference.

🎬 [**“We are recovering at a much faster rate than any other nation.”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2785bc5b3c&e=3ee4985eea)

**The unemployment rate** **fell** 1.6 percentage points for Africans Americans, 2.4 percentage points for Hispanic Americans, and 1.3 percentage points for Asian Americans. It also dropped 2.1 percentage points for women and an impressive 2.8 percentage points for Americans without a high-school diploma.

**In fact, the improvement** in the overall unemployment rate to 8.4 percent surpasses what forecasters expected to see by _the end of the year_ , let alone by the end of August.

**As Americans** celebrated Labor Day yesterday, President Trump held a news briefing to discuss the country’s path forward. His vision includes an expansion of the popular “Opportunity Zone” tax cuts, which have helped boost growth in low-income areas.

📖 [**Economy Continues to Rebound As Unemployment Rate Drops**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1d2adb860a&e=3ee4985eea)

[**🎬****A fast return to “unprecedented prosperity” with pro-America policies**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ee7c9eddc8&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---

---

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Peter, Disney is standing with the Chinese Communist Party
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Liberals in business, Hollywood, sports, and academia need to know that their love for the Chinese Communist Party is unacceptable. Will you sign my petition demanding that Disney stop kowtowing to the Chinese Communist Party?
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MDY1OTUS1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDczNDMwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,

For months, I've warned about the left-wing takeover of American corporations.

Now, we're seeing just how bad the problem is. Walt Disney has been sucking up to the Chinese Communist Party.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MDY1OTUS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDczNDMwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MDY1OTUS1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDczNDMwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

That's right: Walt Disney has:
* Filmed a Chinese nationalist movie next to a Communist concentration camp
* Thanked the Chinese Communist Party thugs who run the camps
* Given the star role to a Chinese actress who supported the Communist oppression in Hong Kong

Keep in mind, Disney threatened to stop filming in the state of Georgia because Georgia passed a law prohibiting late-term abortions.

Protect unborn children? Disney will boycott. But when the Chinese Communist Party commits genocide? **Disney is happy to cash in.**

**Peter, we cannot keep quiet while liberal American business leaders and the far Left try to choose China over their own country. **

[**Will you stand with me by adding your name to a petition denouncing Disney 's work with China?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDM0MDY1OTUS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTg0MDczNDMwNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Mark Warner
subject: disrespectful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

Service members who make the ultimate sacrifice to keep our country safe aren't "losers" or "suckers." They're heroes.

I was outraged to hear President Trump disrespect Americans who died in combat-- but I wasn't surprised. We've known that President Trump's understanding of patriotism and service is lacking. We've heard him disrespect prisoners of war, mock war heroes, and attack Gold Star families. It seems like he doesn't understand the sacrifice that these brave people and their families have made for our country.

We should all honor that sacrifice. That's why I spent my time as Governor and as Senator working to make sure that members of our military have the physical and mental health resources they need during and after their service. I've fought to make sure that Gold Star families have the benefits they're entitled to. And I've worked with military families to hold private housing corporations accountable for living conditions in military housing. And I'll continue to work hard to make sure our service members, veterans, and military families are cared for.

The sacrifice that members of our military and their families make for our country is great -- and deserves great respect. |
---
-- Mark Warner

name: Biden Victory Fund
subject: Peter, how would you like to meet Joe Biden?
body:
Would you like to speak one-on-one with Joe Biden after his first debate against Donald Trump? |
---
Peter,

**How would you like to speak one-on-one with Joe Biden after his first debate against Donald Trump?**

In the primary, we would choose one lucky supporter to fly out to the debate to watch, cheer Joe on, and meet him in person.

In our new socially distant reality, we won't be sending anyone to the debates. But we do want to give you the opportunity to talk to Joe after the debate and congratulate him on a job well done.

**We 'll be picking one lucky supporter for a personal call with Joe after the debate -- chip in using one of the links or buttons in this email, and you'll automatically be entered into this contest.**

[Any amount, whether it's $25 or whatever you can afford today, gives you an automatic chance to win a special post-debate chat with Joe. Your donation will also be put directly to work in electing Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Democrats across the country. If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c7/2842539677/VEsEAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden and the Democrats.

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden and Democrats up and down the ballot by clicking the button below.

| [DONATE »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c6/2842539677/VEsEAA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bvf-homepage&refcode=VF_EM_FR_2020.06.16_B8_footer_X__F1_S1_C1__footer?amount=25")
---

We know we send a lot of emails, and we are sorry about that. The reason? We are relying on grassroots supporters like you (we're serious!).

If you'd like to unsubscribe from our emails, you can [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c7/2842539677/VEsEAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/bvf-unsubscribe/").

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- Biden Victory Fund
Paid for by Biden Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Biden for President, the Democratic National Committee and the State Democratic Parties in these states: AK, AL, AZ, CO, DE, FL, GA, ID, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, PA, SC, TN, TX, VA, VT, WI, AND WV.
_Contributions or gifts to Biden Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win; nor will any purchase, payment or contribution improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by September 29, 2020. Enter by contributing [**here**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c5/2842539677/VEsEAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/talk-with-joe-after-the-debate?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.09.05_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all") or alternatively, **[click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c4/2842539677/VEsEDQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/talk-with-joe-after-the-debate?source=JB_EM_PET_2020.09.05_contest-footer_X__F1_S1_C1__all") ** to enter without contributing. By entering you agree to be bound by the official rules governing the sweepstakes, available **[here.](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b262/1cd0ac28/15e011cce/357062c3/2842539677/VEsEDA/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/talk-with-joe-after-the-debate")** One winner will receive the following prize package: A call with Vice President Biden. Two (2) Joe 2020 T-shirts from the Biden Victory FundStore (approx. retail value $60). Winner will be selected by random drawing from all eligible entries to be held on or about 09/29/2020. The prize may be forfeited and awarded to an alternate eligible winner if two attempts to contact the winner by phone or email are not successful. Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of the 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico; those 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law); and those who would be lawfully permitted to accept the prize under applicable federal, state and local law. Sponsor: Biden Victory Fund, 430 S Capitol St SE Washington DC 20003.

The first $5,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee ("PAC") will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $2,800/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $2,800/$5,000 for the general election. For contributions made after the primary, the full amount of the contribution, up to $2,800/$5,000, will be designated for the general election. The next $35,500/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $150,000/$75,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AZ, CO, FL, GA, MI, MN, NC, NE, NH, NV, OH, PA, TX, VA, and WI. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AL, DE, KS, LA, MA, MD, MS, NJ, NY, VT, and WV. The next $110,000/$55,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from: AK, ID, IN, KY, ME, MO, MT, ND, NM, SC, and TN. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.

The allocation listed above may change if a contributor designates their contribution for a particular participant(s) or if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. _

**So even though voting may look different for you this year, we wanted to make sure you still had a chance to get that same feeling -- with our new "I voted" enamel pin:** [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525185/45c30650/1c0f5aef5/66e8c12e/3145553434/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNlcDIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYwNEZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwOTA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sep20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV04F_PIN_LAU_T_20200908_V1S3_P") **[Make a donation of $25 or more to help elect Democrats like Elizabeth, and we'll send you a free "I voted" enamel pin as a thank you.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525185/45c30650/1c0f5aef5/66e8c12e/3145553434/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNlcDIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYwNEZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwOTA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sep20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV04F_PIN_LAU_T_20200908_V1S3_P")**

Wear your pin after casting your early vote, or on Election Day, or just all day every day, including on your pajamas and during all your video chats.

You'll be able to show the world that you're a voter. You'll remind everyone in your life to make their voices heard. And as a grassroots donor, you'll help grow our movement for big, structural change.

But we can only offer these exclusive enamel pins for a limited time before supplies run out -- so if you can, make sure you snag yours today.

**[Support Warren Democrats with a donation of $25 or more today, and you'll receive one of our brand-new "I voted" enamel pins as a sign of Elizabeth's gratitude.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28525185/45c30650/1c0f5aef5/66e8c12e/3145553434/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLXNlcDIwZnItcGluIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJFTVYwNEZfUElOX0xBVV9UXzIwMjAwOTA4X1YxUzNfUCJ9/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-sep20fr-pin?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV04F_PIN_LAU_T_20200908_V1S3_P")**

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Sen. Cornyn has had five days to stand up to the president
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa360a/3308072881/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | It's been five days since we learned that Trump thinks soldiers who were wounded or killed in combat are "losers" and "suckers." Senator John Cornyn still hasn't stood up to the president.

He's had plenty of time to tweet about sunrises, restaurants in New York City, and fancy business lobbies -- but not a peep in defense of our troops.

This grassroots team, on the other hand, has stepped up in a big way. In just two days, y'all pitched in over half a million dollars to support our campaign to defeat Sen. Cornyn -- who has proved himself to be, in no uncertain terms, a cowardly bootlicker.

**John Cornyn should take note: This is a demand for leaders who will defend our troops, not stand by as the Commander-in-Chief insults and degrades them.[Pitch in now to help us make sure he gets the message.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa3609/3308072881/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200908.3nd__2074__&amount=10")**

I medevac'd soldiers off the battlefield in Afghanistan, and I've seen their sacrifices firsthand. Soldiers who would never be able to walk again, dance at their weddings, play catch with their kids -- and soldiers who made the ultimate sacrifice in service to our country, whose families would have to live with the pain of their loss forever.

I have scars from shrapnel wounds up and down my arm that remind me of the pain and fear we felt the day my own helicopter was shot down -- but they also remind me of my deep sense of pride for having served my country.

**If John Cornyn does not believe that people like me, my crew members, and the soldiers we medevac 'd are losers and suckers, he needs to condemn these remarks.**

Sen. Cornyn has stood by the president, even after he disparaged patriot John McCain, denigrated the Gold Star family of Captain Humayun Khan, disrespected and discredited transgender military members, and stole funds from our military bases for his border wall.

He's probably hoping that this will all go away. That, like so many other outrageous moments of the last few years, he can just cower behind the president and wait until it passes.

We are not going to let that happen. **[That's why I'm asking you to pitch in right now, because we need momentum that will terrify John Cornyn and send a message loud and clear: Our troops deserve better.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa3609/3308072881/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200908.3nd__2074__&amount=10")**

This is a call to action to every patriot across the country: We have to stand up for the next generation putting on the uniform and send a resounding message at the ballot box that we will not tolerate the disrespect of our troops.

I'm counting on you to help answer the call.

Thanks,
MJ
| [DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa3609/3308072881/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200908.3nd__2074__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa3608/3308072881/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIwNzQifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2074&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa360f/3308072881/VEsA/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.
---

MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. Use of her military rank, job, titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense, Air Force, or Air National Guard.

MJ for Texas
P.O. Box 7156
Round Rock, TX 78683

Contributions or gifts to MJ for Texas are not tax-deductible.

| | Paid for by MJ for Texas

| | If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f9c/7f51f7bc/42f1c86f/4efa360e/3308072881/VEsB/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/unsubscribe").

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Getting back to school
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Each year in Rhode Island, Labor Day marks the (unofficial) end to our summer. It's a busy time, and with daily press conferences last week on all our preparations to get back to school safely, you may not have been able to catch everything. That's why I wanted to make sure you had a chance to see last week's fantastic conversation during our seventh weekly Back to School forum with Health and Human Services Secretary Womazetta Jones and Providence Superintendent Harrison Peters. If you didn't catch it last Thursday, you can check it out [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fiTmM1svus44XYMJ_CjgaMbrSfNREVjwXntNWSD5aokJTwo60xHhIZctVYfqEiTPNW5SSL6n9CFWd2VtTycZUDxnbdhB0qxrK-1YQ_Mac4iDWTvBVAvDpM9uTUGIx7Utcx854jsN7I0SJHLOn3bo2hxu_WMfHEHZKbFjklHAgg7XOik1uwOnXoaDBOJKqncYQHYz_0UXh0=&c=3b1qXNgK-PLVzgCg_CCFp-molhFg5NXPGWEKLScYii2uaqDBWUMdyQ==&ch=97aHUgG3GManCOhg-99h-VBv3fXZ_8VSSyi1_e1yT5o3TXG8g1KTig==):
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fiTmM1svus44XYMJ_CjgaMbrSfNREVjwXntNWSD5aokJTwo60xHhIZctVYfqEiTPNW5SSL6n9CFWd2VtTycZUDxnbdhB0qxrK-1YQ_Mac4iDWTvBVAvDpM9uTUGIx7Utcx854jsN7I0SJHLOn3bo2hxu_WMfHEHZKbFjklHAgg7XOik1uwOnXoaDBOJKqncYQHYz_0UXh0=&c=3b1qXNgK-PLVzgCg_CCFp-molhFg5NXPGWEKLScYii2uaqDBWUMdyQ==&ch=97aHUgG3GManCOhg-99h-VBv3fXZ_8VSSyi1_e1yT5o3TXG8g1KTig==)
---
| Last week's Back to School forum was one of our best discussions so far. Superintendent Peters was able to share his unique perspective working 24/7 to get our state's largest district ready for school. And Secretary Jones gave us the big-picture look at how important in-person learning is for our students' physical and mental health, as well as the services available to students who are struggling. I hope you'll take some time to listen to what they had to say as we get ready for the first day of school next week.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fiTmM1svus44XYMJ_CjgaMbrSfNREVjwXntNWSD5aokJTwo60xHhOKna9ifCC2ZtNyPQb2M6t17_HCgVKdk4ThYSAOP_rhAA3plri85yKeXKUSzUOvNb-VhDehq95T89ty33KJ_bC1ANkM5LJ_XVkN9EPQNKsK0_nm2xj1k9JDX8t6F4TMVjhKW0FzH1a6Zb8kUHytPPg0=&c=3b1qXNgK-PLVzgCg_CCFp-molhFg5NXPGWEKLScYii2uaqDBWUMdyQ==&ch=97aHUgG3GManCOhg-99h-VBv3fXZ_8VSSyi1_e1yT5o3TXG8g1KTig==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fiTmM1svus44XYMJ_CjgaMbrSfNREVjwXntNWSD5aokJTwo60xHhOKna9ifCC2ZtNyPQb2M6t17_HCgVKdk4ThYSAOP_rhAA3plri85yKeXKUSzUOvNb-VhDehq95T89ty33KJ_bC1ANkM5LJ_XVkN9EPQNKsK0_nm2xj1k9JDX8t6F4TMVjhKW0FzH1a6Zb8kUHytPPg0=&c=3b1qXNgK-PLVzgCg_CCFp-molhFg5NXPGWEKLScYii2uaqDBWUMdyQ==&ch=97aHUgG3GManCOhg-99h-VBv3fXZ_8VSSyi1_e1yT5o3TXG8g1KTig==).
---
| As a reminder, this Thursday's conversation will be devoted entirely to questions submitted by students. If your child has a question, they can submit it here: [forms.gle/J3CTNn9PJcaMhpuo8](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014fiTmM1svus44XYMJ_CjgaMbrSfNREVjwXntNWSD5aokJTwo60xHhIZctVYfqEiTQJ4PksG5DWi5b10QxiRSeUu2Ngog7n5dVutqxTpKextXr-OEQf68Njs3PdN4NZskNhKWbTPX7xy9Qk6wdm5LGiBQ2bOAPXOK&c=3b1qXNgK-PLVzgCg_CCFp-molhFg5NXPGWEKLScYii2uaqDBWUMdyQ==&ch=97aHUgG3GManCOhg-99h-VBv3fXZ_8VSSyi1_e1yT5o3TXG8g1KTig==).
We're all in this together,
-Gina Raimondo Governor

---

subject: Simple way to make a difference
body:
We're almost 50 days out from Election Day - and we need your help.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/simple-way-to-make-a-difference?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ6WK9eHX9imguFhctIACxhh6ojIEtxb10EB8zy8Xt9tyAnw/viewform?mc_cid=9d50172486&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Hoosier Republicans,

We're reaching a major milestone this weekend - we're almost 50 days out from Election Day!

That means we need our entire Republican team -- including you -- sharing our Republican message with voters. And we've got a great opportunity this Saturday to:
* Help make phone calls to voters from your home, and/or
* Safely go door-to-door in your community

Would you sign up to be part of our Super Saturday this weekend?

It's Saturday, September 12th. We'll be out talking with voters about the election, and the reasons why it's critical we support our Republican team up and down the ballot. We know what's at stake, and we can't let Democrats move Indiana backward.

--> Click here to sign up for Super Saturday <-- (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ6WK9eHX9imguFhctIACxhh6ojIEtxb10EB8zy8Xt9tyAnw/viewform?mc_cid=9d50172486&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

When you s (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ6WK9eHX9imguFhctIACxhh6ojIEtxb10EB8zy8Xt9tyAnw/viewform?mc_cid=9d50172486&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) ign up (https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScZ6WK9eHX9imguFhctIACxhh6ojIEtxb10EB8zy8Xt9tyAnw/viewform?mc_cid=9d50172486&mc_eid=%5bUNIQID%5d&mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) , a member of our team will reach out to you. They'll provide you with all the information you need to have a successful day representing your Indiana Republican Party.

The best way to make a difference in the upcoming election is by getting out and talking with voters. We're almost 50 days out -- so let's put in the groundwork now that earns us victory in just a few short weeks!

-Your Indiana Republican Party

============================================================
** Twitter (http://www.twitter.com/indgop?mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
** Facebook (http://www.facebook.com/indgop?mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])
** Website (http://www.indiana.gop?mc_cid=3c4e6a357c&mc_eid=[UNIQID])

name: Terry McAuliffe
subject: It’s time for Louis DeJoy to resign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek,
Friday the Washington Post published an explosive report detailing Postmaster General Louis DeJoy’s shady donation scheme to help Donald Trump and the Republican Party. According to the Post, DeJoy pressured his employees to contribute to Republican campaigns and then reimbursed them in violation of state and federal laws. I don’t know about you, but I’m sick and tired of the rank corruption of the Trump administration. It’s WAY past time for DeJoy to go and today I’m calling for his resignation. **[Please, add your name right now and join me in demanding the resignation of Postmaster General Louis DeJoy.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkK7Qgc5H0MqjL8MGFEHgfbIXvxNdVU0cE-Dzt1xvlrbfo7sWqD7SedSm3EylGsf94EjgXXOBSU3A9uZ83dzS76CMqM41ytkYAQsThAtHgaKsRpUZEqMWsy8ilxhmhyY0y5Eo9fdNmM0-pWQo8qcILASjpPVvhSwSF29Jsa3X_zZgJkDcmvBmQr4pEYjAGFZgyEUdnZS1GMn00nkETBM-H_NTU4_nX8a7yOh81tKmSk6DLIWQRk6yz0aVLgT6JTfMiaLHQZr09-jmn4Bv6zHt09E009mQM36tQsn6zeZaFq8yfh8MMwa9If-cKLWorQ_mrU5Grb-1M5qb7zgiqDkFGZW-V5LgZzDz94x6mrNvlsMA/350/xrd0EM45S0a04DxZ97HalQ/h0/9RSZpR266vcAunmJ_SJKiFs1vxgyCTNhff_JS8NFnug) ** Let’s get real. Louis DeJoy never should have been running the Postal Service in the first place. Donald Trump only picked him for the job because DeJoy was one of the top donors to his campaign. Now we’re seeing late deliveries, reduced hours, the removal of sorting machines — we’re in the middle of a pandemic and instead of preparing for the upcoming election, Trump and DeJoy are teaming up to sabotage it. It’s corrupt, it’s anti-democratic, and we need it to stop immediately. **[It’s time for Louis Dejoy to resign. Can you add your name if you agree?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkK7Qgc5H0MqjL8MGFEHgfbIXvxNdVU0cE-Dzt1xvlrbfo7sWqD7SedSm3EylGsf94EjgXXOBSU3A9uZ83dzS76CMqM41ytkYAQsThAtHgaKsRpUZEqMWsy8ilxhmhyY0y5Eo9fdNmM0-pWQo8qcILASjpPVvhSwSF29Jsa3X_zZiL6Sc2KDnxfFBSviW14r5ENZ57A33A4Yf1VYa0Ww0fgzMV8VaoVn3whaEK0vC5sD1YT9oA7ZQFlIOgQgm7CAuKAYcS9nN3nOBis3Br0QPOkjAm9We4ZdZLWkizmwdD_VxFGpas6z7-5PbQ1aoDERUcICwP231bAMbVBWpeUeU0exStHH71GkxBLFIP-Dbsfww/350/xrd0EM45S0a04DxZ97HalQ/h1/SNbSnZI0PXyp9-udYSoeIVi7mBHS8r2w9dKhfywEuKU) ** Thanks, Terry
| [**DONATE »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkLs34ip987PAXxWSApnt61JEb7YLljnK1H_bJ-Seev7KQVoCN63KVETBlVrouM_uplr5uVvg8Bi98_piSLHDoMv1FAN5o6NKFO4n7X1z0tY_24bCNgVuZ_CtNAaypB8FOwfsNpgDKmLUozhZAU2nymKsCQ-d1fkDh-4N1MyQHuRDJd_2j0AmGDgkedq0sQidsUnwXbs0FATto2jt4aiLnKKth653SEN8VxDb1fRTfe67IJfaIMR91TJ2SOzmSYgGaUdJAgDeKoNT4prREjqovd-Ub3ncKLj-DJk9HML5kt8sc4oW30roCTJvyqWLr5E1b7-V96vGPpb4GJgrxR9Tu1w/350/xrd0EM45S0a04DxZ97HalQ/h2/XLW8NpwsSoVaHqYO4TgmY52Sa2d0ToM0aHK27KdNtMo)
